steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The sentence says Stradivari changed the shape of a traditional violin by flattening some curves and making the instrument lighter overall. The pronoun in the blank refers to "a traditional violin," which is singular.

steps.title: Choose singular agreement
steps.content: A and C are plural pronouns, so they do not agree with the singular antecedent. B is singular but awkward and unclear in this context. A singular pronoun that clearly refers to the traditional violin is required. The answer is D.
